---
title: "powerlifting module"
author: "Keelin Joyce"
format: html
editor: visual
---
## Getting Started
#### Importing Data 
```{r}
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)

library(readr)
openpl_male <- read_csv("keelinjoyce/powerlifting/openpl_male.csv")
View(openpl_male)

openpl_female <- read_csv("openpl_female.csv")
View(openpl_female)
```

#### Assessing Data
```{r}
ggplot(data = openpl_female, aes(x = Bench)) +
  geom_histogram() +
  facet_wrap(~AgeClass)
```
